mapper.select: SELECT id, page_code, template_code, name, config_json, enabled, is_default, updated_at FROM workflow_template WHERE page_code = #{pageCode} AND template_code = #{templateCode} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, page_code, template_code, name, config_json, enabled, is_default, updated_at FROM workflow_template WHERE page_code = #{pageCode} AND enabled = TRUE AND is_default = TRUE ORDER BY updated_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO workflow_template (page_code, template_code, name, config_json, enabled, is_default, updated_at) VALUES (#{pageCode}, #{templateCode}, #{name}, #{configJson}::jsonb, #{enabled}, #{isDefault}, NOW()) RETURNING id
mapper.update: UPDATE workflow_template SET name = #{name}, config_json = #{configJson}::jsonb, enabled = #{enabled}, is_default = #{isDefault}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE workflow_template SET is_default = FALSE, updated_at = NOW() WHERE page_code = #{pageCode} AND is_default = TRUE
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM workflow_template WHERE page_code = #{pageCode} AND template_code = #{templateCode}
mapper.select: SELECT id, page_code, data, status, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by FROM data_record WHERE id = #{recordId} AND page_code = #{pageCode} LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO workflow_instance ( page_code, record_id, template_id, template_code, status, current_node_code, starter, started_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{pageCode}, #{recordId}, #{templateId}, #{templateCode}, 'submitted', #{currentNodeCode}, #{starter}, NOW(), NOW() ) RETURNING id

SELECT wi.id, wi.page_code, wi.record_id, wi.template_id, wi.template_code, wi.status, wi.current_node_code, wi.starter, wi.started_at, wi.finished_at, wi.updated_at, wt.name AS template_name FROM workflow_instance wi LEFT JOIN workflow_template wt ON wt.id = wi.template_id WHERE wi.record_id = #{recordId} AND wi.page_code = #{pageCode} AND wi.status = 'submitted' ORDER BY wi.id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT wi.id, wi.page_code, wi.record_id, wi.template_id, wi.template_code, wi.status, wi.current_node_code, wi.starter, wi.started_at, wi.finished_at, wi.updated_at, wt.name AS template_name FROM workflow_instance wi LEFT JOIN workflow_template wt ON wt.id = wi.template_id WHERE wi.record_id = #{recordId} AND wi.page_code = #{pageCode} ORDER BY wi.id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE workflow_instance SET current_node_code = #{currentNodeCode}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{instanceId} AND status = 'submitted'
UPDATE workflow_instance SET status = #{status}, current_node_code = NULL, finished_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{instanceId} AND status = 'submitted'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO workflow_task ( instance_id, record_id, page_code, template_id, template_code, node_code, assignee, status, action, comment, operated_by, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{instanceId}, #{recordId}, #{pageCode}, #{templateId}, #{templateCode}, #{nodeCode}, #{assignee}, #{status}, #{action}, #{comment}, #{operatedBy}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM workflow_task WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND node_code = #{nodeCode} AND status = 'pending' AND assignee IS NULL ORDER BY id LIMIT 1
SELECT id FROM workflow_task WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND status = 'pending' AND assignee = #{assignee} ORDER BY id LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE workflow_task SET status = 'done', action = #{action}, comment = #{comment}, operated_by = #{operator}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'pending'
UPDATE workflow_task SET status = 'cancelled', action = 'skip', updated_at = NOW() WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND node_code = #{nodeCode} AND status = 'pending'
UPDATE workflow_task SET status = 'cancelled', action = 'skip', updated_at = NOW() WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND status = 'pending'
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM workflow_task t JOIN workflow_instance wi ON wi.id = t.instance_id LEFT JOIN workflow_template wt ON wt.id = wi.template_id WHERE t.status = 'pending' AND t.assignee = #{assignee} AND wi.page_code = #{pageCode}
AND ( CAST(wi.record_id AS TEXT) ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keywords}, '%') OR COALESCE(wt.name, '') ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keywords}, '%') OR t.node_code ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keywords}, '%') )

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM workflow_task t JOIN workflow_instance wi ON wi.id = t.instance_id LEFT JOIN workflow_template wt ON wt.id = wi.template_id WHERE t.status = 'done' AND t.action IN ('approve', 'reject') AND t.operated_by = #{operator} AND wi.page_code = #{pageCode}
AND ( CAST(wi.record_id AS TEXT) ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keywords}, '%') OR COALESCE(wt.name, '') ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keywords}, '%') OR t.node_code ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keywords}, '%') )

SELECT t.id AS task_id, t.instance_id, t.record_id, t.page_code, t.template_code, wt.name AS template_name, t.node_code, t.assignee, t.status AS task_status, t.action, t.comment, t.operated_by, t.created_at, t.updated_at FROM workflow_task t LEFT JOIN workflow_template wt ON wt.id = t.template_id WHERE t.instance_id = #{instanceId} ORDER BY t.id ASC
